idea-plugin.name: 灵镜 • LingMirror
idea-plugin.description:
LingMirror is a professional ClassLoader leak detection tool for Java developers. It provides a comprehensive "health check" for your JVM, identifying memory leaks caused by static references, JDBC drivers, and singleton patterns with near 90% accuracy. Key features include:
  • Deep static code analysis for ClassLoader leaks.
  • Visual reference chain evidence with clear explanations.
  • One-click navigation to problematic code locations.
  • Support for full report export for team review.
Visit our project to solve OOM problems efficiently.
